response.justification: The candidate is a capable senior full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience, but the role requires a Director-level individual contributor with 15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. The resume shows roughly 13-14 years of professional experience, no demonstrated AI/ML products or platforms, no advanced degree, and no track record of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI product strategy at scale. Recent exposure to MCP and agentic tooling is promising but far below the Principal/Director bar described.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Recent hands-on work with AI agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows
Strong software craftsmanship credentials — TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source platform founder
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at the scale this role demands
Lacks Director-level IC scope — no evidence of advising strategic customers or driving cloud/AI strategy
Experience total and seniority progression fall short of the 15-year Principal bar; no advanced degree

key_factors.factor: Missing recognized AI expertise and products
Emerging AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
